stemHtml: Trip Fuel for a Commercial Air Transport flight includes fuel for…

options.a: take-off, climb, cruise including any step climb, additional discretionary requirements, descent, approach, and landing.
options.b: taxi, take-off, climb, cruise including any step climb, descent, approach, and landing.
options.c: take-off, climb, cruise including any step climb, contingency, descent, approach, and landing.
options.d: take-off, climb, cruise including any step climb, descent, approach, and landing.
